topic: Godot will no longer accept AI-authored code contributions
headline: Godot Bans AI-Authored Code
caption:
As a full stack dev, I find this move by Godot quite intriguing. While AI can generate rapid code snippets, questions about quality and accountability remain. It's great to see the community prioritizing human oversight and trust in open source projects. As AI evolves, balancing innovation with reliability will be key for sustainable growth. What are your thoughts on AI-generated code contributions in open source? 🤔 Keep coding smart! 

#GameDev #OpenSource #AIShouldHelpNotReplace
